cron.name: design-research
cron.prompt: Run your design research routine: use WebFetch to scrape Awwwards, Dribbble, CSS-Tricks, Smashing Magazine, and Codrops. Analyze findings and store_knowledge for each actionable insight.

cron.name: daily-learning
cron.prompt: Run your daily learning routine: use get_project_status to find recently completed projects, analyze_project for each, compute aggregate metrics, and log_metrics with the results.

cron.name: lead-prospecting
cron.prompt: Run the daily lead prospecting routine: call batch_lead_generation() with configured industries and locations. After completion, call get_lead_pipeline(min_score=4.0) to review top leads. For any lead scoring 5.0+, call promote_lead(prospect_id) and begin the pitch pipeline. Report results to the owner.
